title: Booking.com Accommodation
description: Represents an accommodation property listed on Booking.com, including hotels, apartments, hostels, and other lodging types with their details, facilities, and location information.

accommodation_id.description: Unique numeric identifier for the accommodation on Booking.com

name.description: Display name of the accommodation property

description.description: Detailed text description of the accommodation and its offerings

city.description: City where the accommodation is located

city_id.description: Booking.com city identifier used for search queries

accommodation_type.description: Numeric identifier for the type of accommodation (hotel, apartment, hostel, etc.)

accommodation_type_name.description: Human-readable name for the accommodation type

star_rating.description: Official star rating classification of the property

review_score.description: Average guest review score on a scale of 1 to 10

total_reviews.description: Total number of guest reviews for this accommodation

chain_id.description: Identifier for the hotel chain or brand, if applicable

chain_name.description: Name of the hotel chain or brand, if applicable

currency.description: Default currency code for the property (ISO 4217)

checkin_from.description: Earliest check-in time in HH:MM format

checkin_until.description: Latest check-in time in HH:MM format

checkout_from.description: Earliest checkout time in HH:MM format

checkout_until.description: Latest checkout time in HH:MM format

facilities.description: List of facilities and amenities available at the property

rooms.description: Room types available at the accommodation

themes.description: Thematic categories the accommodation belongs to

Facility.description: A facility or amenity available at the property or room level

Photo.description: A photo of the accommodation or its rooms

url.description: URL where the photo can be accessed

tag.description: Category tag for the photo (e.g., room, exterior, lobby)

sort_order.description: Display sort order for the photo

Room.description: A room type available at the accommodation

max_occupancy.description: Maximum number of guests the room can accommodate

bed_configurations.description: Available bed configurations for this room type

BedConfiguration.description: A bed configuration option for a room

bed_type.description: Type of bed (e.g., double, twin, king, queen)

quantity.description: Number of beds of this type
